reply.text: Im suing for emotional damages the weights were not supposed to blush

messages.text: invested is wild, i just lost focus and religion
religion folded at the white shorts huh
shorts hit me harder than preworkout ever did
blame yourself, zero gym immunity built 👀
how i build immunity when you post boss battles
you acting like i attacked you personally
so you just green lit this?
yes hi, president and founding member reporting
president but still skipping leg day is insane
i showed my friends before i even replied
remote work is you watching stories as cardio
honest work, my heart rate hit zone three
if i charge rent for that, you bankrupt
